headline: Home Depot to Acquire Mingledorff's, Expand Into HVAC Market
summary: HD expands into HVAC distribution with Mingledorff's deal, boosts its Pro strategy and taps a $100B market opportunity.

headline: Lowe's Rolls Out Spring Savings and Free Same-Day Delivery on Mulch
summary: Lowe's is kicking off peak home improvement season early as homeowners welcome spring by tackling outdoor projects and refreshing indoor spaces. As days grow longer and temperatures rise, demand for lawn and garden, patio and project essentials builds, making timing and value increasingly important for customers.

headline: The Bull Case For Lowe's (LOW) Could Change Following HomeCare+ Subscription Push And Dividend Payout Decisions
summary: Lowe's board previously declared a quarterly cash dividend of US$1.20 per share, paid on May 6, 2026, to shareholders of record as of April 22, 2026, underscoring its ongoing cash returns to investors. The company also launched HomeCare+, a US$99-a-year in-home maintenance subscription for MyLowe's Rewards members, highlighting a push into recurring service revenue and deeper customer engagement beyond traditional retail sales. We'll now examine how the HomeCare+ subscription launch may...
